axioms: Findability is the cardinal prerequisite for utility; an asset that cannot be found cannot be used.
The structural architecture of information provides the essential cognitive scaffolding for systemic navigation and human comprehension.
kernel_logic.operational_core: Structural discovery precedence over superficial aesthetics.

decision_gates.then: Verify search and browse discoverability first; else abort interface refinement.
Apply faceted classification and metadata schemas; else sustain hierarchical consistency.

decision_gates.if: Conflict exists between aesthetic reduction and wayfinding
decision_gates.then: Prioritize navigational affordance; else optimize visual style.
